name: Dracula run
description: The Dark Lord Dracula woke up and he is completely famished! Take control of the most famous vampire of all time, satisfy your thirst of blood and test your reflexes in this exhilarating platform game. Dracula Quest is an amusing game for the whole family! Only recommended for... everyone!
